about.intro: I am a software engineer with an MBA, working at the intersection of technology and business. I have built internal tools at Toyota Systems, coordinated iOS projects, and spent years navigating both code and markets. Currently exploring AI agents and onchain applications.
about.focus: AI × Crypto. Building useful products. Learning in public.
about.background: Engineering at Toyota Systems, MBA from Laurentian University, fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English.
